mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as active, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completed, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as abnormal FROM biz_transports WHERE is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN damage_level > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as abnormal, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pending FROM biz_detections
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') as date, COUNT(*) as count FROM biz_transports WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) AND is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY date ORDER BY date ASC
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') as date, COUNT(*) as count FROM biz_detections WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) GROUP BY date ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT CASE WHEN damage_level = 0 THEN '无破损' WHEN damage_level = 1 THEN '轻微' WHEN damage_level = 2 THEN '中度' WHEN damage_level = 3 THEN '严重' END as name, COUNT(*) as value FROM biz_detections GROUP BY damage_level ORDER BY damage_level ASC

SELECT CASE WHEN status = 0 THEN '待运输' WHEN status = 1 THEN '运输中' WHEN status = 2 THEN '已完成' WHEN status = 3 THEN '异常' WHEN status = 4 THEN '已取消' END as name, COUNT(*) as value FROM biz_transports WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY status ORDER BY status ASC
